ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the match took place */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map used in the match */,
  "match_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the match started */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match in the format HH:MM:SS */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "match_mode" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Ranked, Casual) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Specific type of match (e.g., Deathmatch, Capture the Flag) */,
  "match_size" TEXT /* Size of the match (e.g., 5v5, 10v10) */,
  "match_version" TEXT /* Version of the game used in the match */,
  "match_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the match ended */,
  "match_replay_url" TEXT /* URL to the match replay (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the server is located */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of the server (e.g., Ranked, Casual) */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players the server can support */,
  "current_players" INTEGER /* Current number of players on the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the server (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "server_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "server_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the server */,
  "server_uptime" INTEGER /* Total uptime of the server in hours */,
  "server_downtime" INTEGER /* Total downtime of the server in hours */,
  "server_software_version" TEXT /* Version of the server software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of the map (e.g., Competitive, Casual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "average_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of matches played on this map */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Average win rate on this map */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the map has been played */,
  "map_size" TEXT /* Size of the map (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "map_creator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the map creator (if applicable) */,
  "map_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was released */,
  "map_last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the player */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "win_count" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the player */,
  "loss_count" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "player_username" TEXT /* Username of the player (if different from player_name) */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "player_xp" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "player_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "player_last_match" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last match */,
  "player_favorite_map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's favorite map */,
  "player_favorite_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's favorite server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player joined the match */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player left the match */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score of the player in the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match for the player (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was on */,
  "player_kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player in the match */,
  "player_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player in the match */,
  "player_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the match */,
  "player_damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player in the match */,
  "player_damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the player in the match */,
  "player_healing_done" INTEGER /* Total healing done by the player in the match */,
  "player_items_collected" INTEGER /* Number of items collected by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_history_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance check */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the server in milliseconds */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage */,
  "uptime_percentage" REAL /* Uptime percentage of the server */,
  "active_matches" INTEGER /* Number of active matches on the server */,
  "server_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the server in percentage */,
  "server_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the server in percentage */,
  "server_network_bandwidth_in" REAL /* Network bandwidth in (upload) in MB/s */,
  "server_network_bandwidth_out" REAL /* Network bandwidth out (download) in MB/s */,
  "server_disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the server in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_performance_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance check */,
  "average_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of matches played on this map */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Average win rate on this map */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the map has been played */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the map */,
  "map_peak_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players on the map at any point */,
  "map_average_players" INTEGER /* Average number of players on the map */,
  "map_peak_matches" INTEGER /* Maximum number of concurrent matches on the map */,
  "map_average_matches" INTEGER /* Average number of concurrent matches on the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_performance_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "role_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., PC, Mobile) */,
  "user_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_map_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server-map relation */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was added to the server */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was removed from the server */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the map is currently active on the server */,
  "map_rotation_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the map is rotated on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_map_relations_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_map_relations_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing feedback */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the player */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., In-game, Website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_feedback_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., Debug, Info, Warning, Error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., Server, Game, Database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)
